paths.name: Register → Student login → Purchase → Reader → Complete lesson
paths.semanticGoal: Cover full happy path across register+login+marketplace+purchase+library+reader and lesson completion success loop.

paths.name: Instructor: Create draft → Edit → Curriculum → Save → Update course
paths.semanticGoal: Cover the instructor authoring chain across new course, create draft feature, edit page, curriculum editor + mutation, and updating course metadata.

paths.name: Admin login → Review approve → Admin courses → Stats → Marketplace
paths.semanticGoal: Cover admin authentication, review queue load, approve decision flow, navigation across admin areas, and safe return to public marketplace.

paths.name: Admin taxonomy mutate → Users manage activation → Users forbidden → Back to courses
paths.semanticGoal: Cover admin taxonomy load+mutation, admin users load+user-management activation change, then forbidden handling and fallback to public courses.

paths.name: Admin: Courses load failed → Retry → Lifecycle blocked (archive+republish)
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked admin-courses load failure+retry and unwalked lifecycle blocked branches for both archive and republish actions, returning back to admin courses each time.

paths.name: Guest: Login → Switch to register → Instructor login → Edit hidden → Curriculum hidden
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked login→register switch, then instructor authentication, then unwalked instructor edit-course entry with hidden/unauthorized branch and unwalked curriculum hidden branch returning to instructor management.

paths.name: Guest: Home → Courses → Detail (then list branches)
paths.semanticGoal: Cover guest entry into home, public course browsing, course detail visibility, and course list empty/failure refresh+retry branches in one connected run.

paths.name: Instructor: Submit course blocked → Then submit success
paths.semanticGoal: Cover submit-for-review feature both failure (blocked) and success (queued) returns to instructor management.

paths.name: My Courses: Load failed → Retry → Browse more → Reader load failed → Retry → Back to library
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked my-courses load failure+retry, unwalked browseMore connector, and unwalked reader load failure+retry before returning to the owned library.

paths.name: Instructor: Empty list → Create first → Draft rejected → Retry → Cancel
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked instructor empty-state handling, unwalked empty→new-course navigation, unwalked create-course rejection path, and unwalked cancel back to instructor courses without creating records.

paths.name: Admin: Review reject blocked → Then reject stored → Return
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked review-decision rejection branches: blocked rejection (missing reason/illegal) and stored rejection, both returning to the review queue with connected transitions.

paths.name: Admin: Users load failed → Retry → Role change saved → Stats → Back to users
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked admin-users load failure+retry, unwalked user-management role change success path, and unwalked users→stats navigation plus returning to users.

paths.name: Instructor: Lifecycle archive → republish
paths.semanticGoal: Cover course lifecycle state transitions (archive + republish) and return loops to instructor management.

paths.name: Guest: Courses → Home → Login denied → Browse anyway
paths.semanticGoal: Cover guest browsing from entry, returning home, attempting login with invalid credentials (denied loop), and returning to public course list.

paths.name: Admin: Taxonomy mutation rejected → Stats load failed → Retry → Marketplace
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked taxonomy-mutation rejection return flow, plus unwalked admin-stats failure+retry, then return safely to the public marketplace.

paths.name: Admin: Taxonomy load failed → Retry → Review → Users → Stats → Review(empty)
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked taxonomy load failure+retry, then unwalked cross-admin navigations (taxonomy→review→users→stats→review) while keeping transitions connected.

paths.name: Admin stats forbidden → marketplace → reader forbidden → back to detail
paths.semanticGoal: Cover admin-stats unauthorized block and safe public fallback, then validate reader access denial correctly returns to marketing-only course detail without leakage.

paths.name: Instructor: Edit load failed → Retry → Update rejected → Retry → Back
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked edit-page load failure+retry, unwalked update-course rejection flow and return, then safe navigation back to instructor course management.

paths.name: Lesson completion blocked → Back to library → Browse courses
paths.semanticGoal: Cover completion write rejection, returning to reader, backing to library empty state, then browsing public courses.

paths.name: Admin: Review load failed → Retry → To admin courses → Back → Courses load failed
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked admin-review load failure+retry, unwalked navigation to admin courses and back, then unwalked admin-courses load failure+retry branch.

paths.name: Admin: Taxonomy role blocked → Back to courses → Home → Register → Login
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked admin-taxonomy forbidden branch and unwalked home→register navigation, then continue into login to extend page coverage without breaking connectivity.

paths.name: My courses guest blocked → Login instructor → Instructor marketplace
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unauthenticated library access blocking, redirect to login, instructor authentication, then returning to public marketplace.

paths.name: Instructor: Curriculum load failed → Retry → Back to instructor courses
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked curriculum-editor load failure+retry and unwalked return from curriculum editor back to instructor management.

paths.name: Guest: Home → Register → Browse → Purchase blocked → Back
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked home→register navigation, unwalked register→browse navigation, and the unwalked purchase-blocked branch returning safely to course detail and back to the marketplace list.

paths.name: User activation rejected → return (unwalked) → review queue
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked user-management activation rejection and unwalked rejected-return connector, then continue to the admin review queue for cross-page stability.

paths.name: Purchase duplicate blocked → Return → Reader granted → Back to detail
paths.semanticGoal: Cover duplicate purchase protection and post-return navigation through reader back to course detail.

paths.name: Admin review → open stats → open courses → open taxonomy → back to review empty
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked admin-review→stats navigation, then stats→courses and courses→taxonomy unwalked navigations, ending back at review empty state for queue stability coverage.

paths.name: Instructor forbidden → back to marketplace → home → register → login
paths.semanticGoal: Cover instructor role-block flow with safe fallback navigation, then extend coverage through guest home/register/login connected transitions.

paths.name: Admin: Courses role blocked → Back to marketplace → Detail → Back
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked admin-courses forbidden branch and unwalked safe fallback to public course browsing, then continue through detail and return to list.

paths.name: Instructor courses load failed → retry → empty → create-first-course → cancel back
paths.semanticGoal: Cover instructor course management load failure+retry, empty handling, first-course creation entry, and cancel navigation without creating records.

paths.name: Admin: Review role blocked → Back to courses → Home → Register
paths.semanticGoal: Cover unwalked admin-review forbidden branch and unwalked safe fallback to the public course list, then continue into an unwalked home→register navigation to extend coverage.

paths.name: Register rejected → Retry → Switch to login
paths.semanticGoal: Cover registration validation failure loop and switching from register to login.
